description: Three images in a row with title and individual labels. Blue-black bordered boxes. Suggestion placeholders when images not uploaded.

SUGGESTION_1.description: What to upload for left slot
SUGGESTION_1.example: Upload a headshot or profile photo of the first person

SUGGESTION_2.description: What to upload for center slot
SUGGESTION_2.example: Upload a headshot or profile photo of the second person

SUGGESTION_3.description: What to upload for right slot
SUGGESTION_3.example: Upload a headshot or profile photo of the third person
